$comment: Structured reference for DonorPerfect database tables accessible via Dynamic Query SELECT statements. Source: DPO_SUP_Manual_XML_API_Documentation050324.pdf. DonorPerfect runs on MS SQL Server 2019; ANSI SQL syntax. All SELECT queries are subject to a 500-row retrieval limit.

DP.notes: Updates via dp_savedonor. ORG_REC='Y' = organization. DONOR_TYPE codes IN/CO are standard but configurable. GIFT_AID_ELIGIBLE = 'Y'/'NO' for UK Gift Aid.

DPUDF.purpose: User-Defined Fields associated with DP donors.
DPUDF.notes: Saved via dp_save_udf_xml with @matching_id=<donor_id>. UK Gift Aid uses GA_TITLE, GA_ADDRESS here. Quebec Law 25: PM_CONSENT, PM_CONSENT_DT, PM_CONSENT_EXPIRY, PM_DELETE, PM_DELETE_DT live here.

DPCODES.purpose: Drop-down code values shown in UI (GL codes, Solicit codes, Campaign codes, Memory/Honor types, etc.).
DPCODES.notes: Updated via dp_savecode. Common FIELD_NAME values: GL_CODE, SOLICIT_CODE, SUB_SOLICIT_CODE, CAMPAIGN, MEMORY_HONOR, ADDRESS_TYPE, DONOR_TYPE, EMAIL_TYPE, FLAG, LINK_TYPE. Use INACTIVE='N' to keep in dropdowns.

DPUSERMULTIVALUES.purpose: Checkbox-field values (e.g., Donor Interests in Bio tab).
DPUSERMULTIVALUES.notes: MATCHING_ID = DONOR_ID. Only checked boxes have rows. Set via mergemultivalues (preferred). NOT the same as flags.

DPFLAGS.purpose: Donor flags (top of Main tab — e.g., Alumni, Board Member).
DPFLAGS.notes: Set via dp_saveflag_xml; delete ALL via dp_delflags_xml. FLAG codes come from DPCODES where FIELD_NAME='FLAG'.

DPGIFT.notes: RECORD_TYPE values: G=Gift, P=Pledge, M=Main (split header), S=Soft credit, A=Original (adjustment), H=Adjustment, C=Cancelled to zero, J=Split cancelled, N=Notification. GLINK relates split children to Main, or soft credits to gifts. PLINK relates pledge payments to parent pledges. ALINK relates resulting gifts to original (adjustment chain).

DPGIFTUDF.notes: Saved via dp_save_udf_xml with @matching_id=<gift_id>. EFT='Y' on a parent pledge enables auto-processing by DP's EFT engine.

DPADDRESS.notes: Saved via dp_saveaddress. Seasonal dates are MMYY format. Join to DPADDRESSUDF on ADDRESS_ID.

DPLINK.notes: Saved via dp_savelink. Reciprocal links are auto-created (Parent ↔ Child, etc.). LINK_CODE comes from DPCODES.

DPCONTACT.purpose: Contact records (Contacts tab) — activities, tasks, meetings, etc.
DPCONTACT.notes: Saved via dp_savecontact. ACTIVITY_CODE values from DPCODES (Code Maintenance > Activity Code/Contact Screen).

DPTHERINFO.purpose: Other Info records (Other Info tab) — free-form additional info dated entries.
DPTHERINFO.notes: Saved via dp_saveotherinfo. Quebec Law 25 PO_* fields live on DPTHERINFOUDF.

DPTHERINFOUDF.notes: Saved via dp_save_udf_xml with @matching_id=<other_id>. Quebec Law 25 PO_CONSENT, PO_CONSENT_DT, PO_CONSENT_EXPIRY, PO_DELETE, PO_DELETE_DT, PO_EXPORT_DT, PO_NOTES live here.

DPTRIBUTESANON.purpose: Tributes (In Honor Of / In Memory Of).
DPTRIBUTESANON.notes: Joined to DPTRIBUTESANON_GIFTASSOC on TRIBUTEID. DPCODE_ID references DPCODES.CODE_ID where FIELD_NAME='MEMORY_HONOR'.

DPTRIBUTESANON_GIFTASSOC.purpose: Many-to-many link between gifts and tributes.

DPTRIBUTESANON_RECIPIENTS.notes: Updated via dp_tribAnon_Update (sets the full list at once) or per-gift via dp_tribAnon_SaveTribRecipient.

DPPAYMENTMETHOD.purpose: Payment methods for EFT transactions (Accounts tab).
DPPAYMENTMETHOD.notes: Insert via dp_PaymentMethod_Insert, update via dp_PaymentMethod_Update. Tied to SafeSave Customer Vault. Update REQUIRES re-supplying all existing values.

SD_FIELD.purpose: Field definition metadata — used to test for field presence in a DP system.
SD_FIELD.notes: Query before sending UDF API calls — e.g., SELECT DISTINCT field_name FROM sd_field WHERE field_name LIKE 'PM_%' OR field_name LIKE 'PO_%' to check Quebec Law 25 fields exist.

delta_query_pattern.description: Recommended pattern to retrieve recent gift changes against the 500-row limit.
delta_query_pattern.example: SELECT TOP 500 gift_id, amount, created_date, modified_date, gl_code FROM dpgift WHERE COALESCE(DPGIFT.MODIFIED_DATE, DPGIFT.CREATED_DATE) >= '{date}' AND gift_id > {last_gift_id} ORDER BY gift_id
delta_query_pattern.notes: COALESCE returns first non-NULL — modified_date if it exists, else created_date. Repeat with the last gift_id returned until you get fewer than 500 rows.
